ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>The response is relevant to the context but lacks a bit of naturalness and persona consistency in its evasion tactics, which are expected from an opportunistic smuggler.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>1<TAB>3<TAB>2<TAB>The response is contextually irrelevant as it fails to consider the dynamic situation and does not align with a negotiation-heavy persona, which would be more fitting for an opportunistic smuggler.
"Response is somewhat relevant but lacks natural dialogue and persona consistency."
